accounts.name: burner
docs: The burner; must have a burner RoleAccount for this mint.

accounts.name: from
docs: Source token account to burn from.

accounts.name: burner_role
docs: Burner role PDA. Existence confirms the role is granted.

accounts.name: master
docs: Must hold the master role for this mint.

accounts.name: ata_to_freeze
docs: The token account to freeze.

accounts.name: master_role
docs: Master role PDA for the signer. Existence confirms the master role.

accounts.name: pause_authority
docs: Required for SSS2 mints with Pausable extension; pass any account for SSS1.

accounts.name: master_role
docs: Master role account for the initial master pubkey.

accounts.name: minter_account
docs: First minter account for the passed minter pubkey.

accounts.name: minter
docs: The minter; must have a MinterAccount PDA for this mint.

accounts.name: to
docs: Destination token account.

accounts.name: minter_account
docs: Minter quota account. Seeds verify that `minter` holds this role for `mint`.

accounts.name: pauser
docs: Must hold the pauser role for this mint.

accounts.name: pauser_role
docs: Pauser role PDA. Existence confirms the pauser role.

accounts.name: from
docs: Source token account to seize from (owner need not sign; permanent delegate authorizes).

accounts.name: to
docs: Destination token account to send seized tokens to.

accounts.name: master
docs: Must hold the master role for this mint.

accounts.name: ata_to_thaw
docs: The token account to thaw.

accounts.name: master_role
docs: Master role PDA for the signer. Existence confirms the master role.

accounts.name: master
docs: Current master; their RoleAccount will be closed.

accounts.name: master_role
docs: Current master's role PDA — will be closed, lamports returned to master.

accounts.name: new_master_role
docs: New master's role PDA — will be created.

accounts.name: pauser
docs: Must hold the pauser role for this mint.

accounts.name: pauser_role
docs: Pauser role PDA. Existence confirms the pauser role.

accounts.name: master
docs: Must hold the master role for this mint.

accounts.name: master_role
docs: Master role PDA for the signer. Existence confirms the master role.

accounts.name: update_minter
docs: The handler validates that this account's key equals the PDA derived from [ROLE_SEED, mint, MINTER_ROLE, minter].

accounts.name: master
docs: Must hold the master role for this mint.

accounts.name: master_role
docs: Master role PDA. Existence confirms the master role.

errors.name: Token2022Required
errors.msg: Token-2022 program required for SSS1 and SSS2

errors.name: MintNotPausable
errors.msg: Mint does not have the Pausable extension

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidReasonLength
errors.msg: Blacklist reason must be at most 100 characters

types.name: MinterAccount
docs: Per-user minter state with quota. Program checks minted + amount <= allowance on mint.
Seeds: [ROLE_SEED, mint, MINTER_ROLE, user]

fields.name: mint
docs: Mint this minter account is for. Enables RPC filtering by mint when listing minters.

types.name: RoleAccount
docs: OpenZeppelin-style role PDA. If account exists → role granted; if closed → revoked.
Seeds: [ROLE_SEED, mint, ROLE_NAME, user]

types.name: UpdateRole
docs: A single role update entry supplied as instruction data.

fields.name: role
docs: Role name: "master" | "minter" | "burner" | "pauser" | "blacklister" | "seizer"

fields.name: old_key
docs: If Some, the old holder's PDA will be closed. Must match remaining_accounts order.

fields.name: new_key
docs: The new holder to grant the role to.

fields.name: allowance
docs: Only used when role == "minter".
